A Little Letter For You 💌

💌

Tap the envelope to open it

Dear Shibhu,

Always smile — you have the cutest smile, and it deserves to be on your face every single day.

Be positive, grounded, and strong. I know you already are, but a little reminder never hurts. Have a great life, don't stress too much, and don't ever forget how loved you are.

With love, [Your Name]

💖

Thank you for being my best friend. ❤️
